Fresh hair loading & a major root touch up. We cut off 2 inches, blunt cut, NO layers.  Did a root touch up/clear gloss & toner to cool down my hair. It naturally pulls a lot of warmth so I’ve always loved cooling down my hair tone. For styling she did a blow out & added curls with the straightening iron. Thank you to the very talented @ashleamorris 🫶🏼#newhair #shoulderbob #brunettehair
